name: THERMOPYLAE
description: Unscripted free-play. Three escalating threat phases then endless chaos.
roe_briefing: Welcome to THERMOPYLAE — an unscripted free-play exercise. There is no scripted threat package and no predetermined end state. The airspace will get progressively more complex. How long you last is up to you.

SITUATION — Threat UAS activity has been observed in the area. All contact types are possible — from commercial quads to autonomous fixed-wing. Expect a slow build. Do not let the quiet early phase make you complacent.
UNKNOWN contacts (yellow) — Do not engage. Call ATC for IFF clearance first. Engaging without clearance is a blue-on-blue incident and will be scored accordingly.
HOSTILE / SUSPECT contacts — Cleared to engage with appropriate effector. Match the threat.
FRIENDLY contacts — Weapons safe. Any engagement is a ROE violation.
Birds and balloons — Ambient traffic. Cannot be engaged under any circumstances.
EXECUTION — Full sensor and effector loadout available. Use it wisely — this exercise does not end on its own. End the mission manually when you are satisfied with your performance.
ENDSTATE — No base breach. Maximum threat neutralization. Full ROE compliance.
